title: Usne Kaha Tha
actors: Sunil Dutt, Nanda Karnataki, Durga Khote
plot: Nandu lives in a small town with his widowed mom, Paro. He is friendly with two young girls, Farida and Kamli. He is depressed when Kamli's dad becomes ill and she and her mom re-locate to Ambala. Years later, Farida and Nandu hav...
